title: Tanium Intelligence Briefing
description: Daily Tanium intelligence briefing with news, product updates, competitive landscape, and a private-company financial snapshot.

news.title: ServiceNow partnership: ITOM AI Prime powered by Tanium
news.desc: Joint Autonomous IT solution integrating the Tanium Autonomous IT Platform with ServiceNow IT Operations Management to detect, resolve, and verify issues without manual intervention.

news.title: Tanium Atlas launched
news.desc: A new autonomous operating system that gives a single IT or security operator the data, guidance, and reach to accomplish what once required an entire team.

news.title: AI & security innovations unveiled at RSAC 2026
news.desc: New platform capabilities across Security Operations, Exposure Management, and Endpoint Management, including Tanium Guardian Spotlight and expanded Tanium AI competencies.

news.title: Named to CRN's 2026 Security 100 List
news.desc: Recognized by The Channel Company among the top security vendors; two Tanium channel leaders also named to the 2026 CRN Channel Chiefs list.

news.title: Leader in IDC MarketScape for Windows Device Management
news.desc: Named a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Client Endpoint Management Software for Windows Device Management 2025–2026 Vendor Assessment for the second time.

news.title: Leader in inaugural Gartner Magic Quadrant for Endpoint Management Tools
news.desc: The Tanium Autonomous IT Platform recognized as a Leader in the first-ever Gartner MQ for this category.

news.title: AI innovations to power Autonomous IT unveiled at Converge
news.desc: Tanium introduced a set of AI capabilities aimed at advancing autonomous IT and operational resilience across the platform.

products.title: Tanium Atlas — Autonomous Operating System
products.desc: Built on a complete, high-fidelity, real-time, and extensible endpoint data foundation: covers every device, captured at the source, answered in seconds, and open to any model, agent, or workflow.

products.title: Tanium Guardian Spotlight
products.desc: Strengthens AI governance with real-time visibility into AI tools, local LLMs, MCP servers, and AI model files across Windows, macOS, and Linux endpoints — surfacing risks such as misconfigured MCP servers.

products.title: Tanium AI — Enrichment & Analysis
products.desc: Two new competency categories that transform alerts and raw datasets into clear, actionable intelligence, adding context from the platform and trusted external sources.

products.title: Autonomous IT Platform (AEM)
products.desc: Converged Endpoint Management foundation spanning Security Operations, Exposure Management, and Endpoint Management — the basis for Tanium's autonomous, outcome-based operations.

products.title: ITOM AI Prime powered by Tanium (ServiceNow)
products.desc: Bundled offering uniting the Tanium platform with ServiceNow ITOM to automate endpoint patching and remediation end to end.

competitors.name: Microsoft Intune / Defender
competitors.strength: Bundled cost advantage for Microsoft-centric estates; cloud-native UEM plus EDR in one ecosystem
competitors.advantage: Real-time, single-agent reach across every OS at massive scale; depth in IT ops, not just management

competitors.name: CrowdStrike Falcon
competitors.strength: Endpoint detection & response leader; AI-native security platform and strong brand
competitors.advantage: Converged IT operations + security from one high-fidelity data source; superior visibility and remediation

competitors.name: Ivanti / HCL BigFix
competitors.strength: Established legacy endpoint management and patching footprint in large enterprises
competitors.advantage: Modern real-time architecture, autonomous platform, and analyst leadership vs. aging stacks

competitors.name: Automox / NinjaOne
competitors.strength: Lightweight, fast-to-deploy, cost-effective patching for SMB and mid-market
competitors.advantage: Enterprise scale, breadth across security and IT ops, and autonomous AI-driven operations

footer: Generated from public web sources for internal competitive-intelligence use. Private-company financials are estimates and vary by source.
